
### exercise: predict+forward (1)  {.smaller}

<!-- \lstset{
    language=myasm,
    morekeywords={mrmovq,irmovq,rmmovq,rrmovq},
} -->
 
 ![](/pipeline/texfig/forwardPathsPredict1.figure.svg)
 
 

* if jle is <i>correctly predicted</i>: 

   * in andq, %r9 is ______ addq.
   * in andq, %r8 is ______ subq.
 
  

   * A: not forwarded from [assume read while writing requires forwarding]
   * B-D: forwarded to decode from {execute,memory,writeback} stage of



### exercise: predict+forward (2)  {.smaller}

![](/pipeline/texfig/forwardPathsPredict2.figure-1.svg)
 

* if jle is <i>mispredicted</i> + resolved after jle's execute: 

   * in andq, %r9 is _____ addq.
   * in andq, %r9 is ___  subq.
 
  

   * A: not forwarded from [assume read while writing requires forwarding]
   * B-D: forwarded to decode from {execute,memory,writeback} stage of

###

![](/pipeline/texfig/forwardPathsPredict2.figure-2.svg)
